name: Vargr (Extents)
description: Uplifted from Terran carnivore stock by the Ancients circa -300,000, the Vargr are canine-descended, digitigrade sophonts with a pack-oriented culture built around charisma, reputation, and shifting loyalties. A Vargr born in the Vargr Extents — the sprawl of feuding confederations that is their cultural heartland — grows up immersed in pack politics, personal magnetism as currency, and the expectation that authority lasts only as long as you hold it.

traits.name: Bite
traits.description: All Vargr possess pronounced canines which make for a nasty close combat weapon. This bite uses the Melee (natural) skill and does 1D+1 damage.

traits.name: Heightened Senses
traits.description: Vargr have better hearing and sense of smell than humans. All Vargr receive DM+1 to any Recon and Survival checks they have to make. However, their eyesight is worse in darkness and they suffer DM-1 to any skill check requiring sight in dark conditions.

traits.name: Charismatic Culture
traits.description: Raised in the shifting factional politics of the Extents. When dealing with other Vargr from the same cultural background, DM+1 to Persuade and Carouse checks.
